Home / About
About Our Center

Where Science
Meets Compassion

Medical Park Antalya is the Mediterranean region's largest private hospital and one of Europe's leading organ transplant centers.

Our Story

25 Years of
Saving Lives

Starting with 37 operations in 2000, we have grown into a center performing over 600 transplants annually — more than most hospitals worldwide.

Our principle: world-class quality standards, minimal complications, and a human approach to every patient. We don't just perform operations — we give a second chance at life.

0transplants
0patient beds
0operating theaters
0ICU beds
Our Values

What Matters to Us

Patient Safety

10 operating theaters with laminar airflow systems for complex transplants. The lowest complication rates in Turkey.

Compassion

Every patient is accompanied by a coordinator who speaks their language — from first contact through full recovery. We understand the importance of support.

Innovation

Cutting-edge equipment: PET-CT, linear accelerator, and 10 operating theaters built to transplant standards for precise surgical planning.

Our Doctors

A Team Trusted
by Thousands

Our surgeons trained at the world's best medical institutions and bring decades of transplant experience.

Prof. Dr. İbrahim Aliosmanoğlu

Head of the Organ Transplant Department

Living-donor & cadaveric liver and kidney transplantation, adults and children.

Profile & CV

Prof. Dr. Havva Asuman Yavuz

Nephrology Specialist

Kidney transplant, donor & recipient preparation and follow-up.

Profile & CV

Prof. Dr. Yaşar Tuna

Gastroenterology Specialist

Liver disease, hepatitis, ERCP & EUS — care before and after transplant.

Profile & CV

Op. Dr. Eyüp Mehmet Kılınç

Transplant Surgeon · General Surgery

Living-donor and cadaveric kidney transplant surgery.

Profile soon

Dr. Levent Yücetin

Organ Transplant Coordinator

Guides each patient through every stage — from inquiry to recovery.

Facilities

State-of-the-Art
Facilities

10 Operating Theaters

Equipped to transplant surgery standards with laminar airflow systems.

73 ICU Beds

Separate ICU units for adults and children with 24/7 monitoring.

Advanced Diagnostics

64-slice CT, angiography, digital mammography, and a genetic lab capable of 250 tests per day.
